signup.title: Sign up
signup.phone_hint: So we can contact you in case of a breakdown
signup.success_email_sent: An email has been sent to your account {{email}} to activate it
signup.error_unauthorized: This email is not allowed to register

validate.activate_subtitle: You just need to activate your account
validate.validate_subtitle: You just need to choose a password!

forgot_password.title: Reset password
forgot_password.code_sent_to: We've sent a code to your email

profile.title: Profile
profile.phone_hint: Only so we can contact you in case of an incident with the bike
profile.demo_text: This is a test text for internationalization.

assignments.title: Book a bike
assignments.window_limited: Your company allows booking up to {{window}} in advance.
assignments.window_unlimited: Your company has no booking date limit.
assignments.max_one_day: You can only select one day.
assignments.max_days: You can select up to {{days}} days.

historial.title: History
historial.cancel_confirm_end: Are you sure you want to end the assignment for {{name}} on {{date}}?
historial.cancel_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete the assignment for {{name}}?

users.title: Users
users.delete_confirm: Confirm you want to delete user {{email}}?
users.user_created_no_email: User created, but the email could not be sent. Please provide this link to the user
users.user_created: A confirmation email has been sent to the new user

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.weekdays_modal_desc: Block certain days of the week, usually Saturdays and Sundays, when the garage is closed. On these days no pickups or returns can be made. However, it is still allowed to pick up a bike before the blocked day and return it after.
admin.blocked_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this date range?
admin.range_desc_from: Set a start date with no end date
admin.range_desc_to: Set an end date with no start date
admin.locker_code_empty_note: If you leave this field empty, the locker will be considered to have no code.
admin.max_time_hint: A user can have the vehicle assigned for a maximum duration
admin.max_time_zero_hint: Set to 0 to indicate no limit
admin.avail_window_modal_p1: The available booking window defines how far in advance users can book a bicycle. You can configure this value to limit how many days, weeks or months ahead users can make a booking.
admin.avail_window_modal_p2: If you set the value to 0, the restriction is disabled and users can book without any advance limit.
admin.start_hour_hint1: The earliest time a user can pick up the vehicle
admin.start_hour_hint2: Example: If the garage opens at 9:00
admin.start_hour_max_hint1: The latest time pickups are accepted
admin.start_hour_max_hint2: Example: If the garage closes pickups at 20:00
admin.start_hour_max_hint3: To disable, set to the same value as the end hour (end_hour).
admin.end_hour_hint1: Maximum return time for the vehicle
admin.end_hour_hint2: Example: If the garage closes at 18:00
admin.end_hour_min_hint: This is the hour after which bikes can start being returned. To disable, set to the same value as the start hour (start_hour).
admin.safety_buffer_modal_desc: Enter the safety wait time a bike will wait between user bookings
admin.assignment_reminder_time_desc: How far in advance the user will be notified before their booking ends. Each user can manually disable this notification from their profile.
admin.trusted_domains_delete_note: Deleting the domain will not delete existing accounts.
admin.trusted_domains_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the domain {{domain}}?
admin.trusted_domains_info: The domains you add here will be the only ones allowed for user registration. If a user tries to register with an email from an unauthorized domain, they will not be able to complete registration.
admin.trusted_domains_exact_note: This domain is exact: only that extension will be allowed (e.g. if you add empresa.com, empresa.es will not be allowed).
admin.trusted_domains_no_ext_note: By not specifying an extension (".com", ".es", etc.), all extensions for this domain will be allowed.

incidents.title: Incidents
incidents.subtitle: Does your bike need repair? We're ready to help you with whatever you need.
incidents.home_repair_desc: With your current plan, you have access to home repair service. A technician will contact you within 48 hours.
incidents.store_repair_desc: All our plans include Panot in-store assistance. Choose the date that suits you best and come see us to resolve any issue.
incidents.contact_subtitle: Have questions or need help? We're here for you:
incidents.contact_cta: Don't hesitate to write or call us!

tsystems_privacy.para1: <s>PANOT MOBILITY, S.L.</s> informs you that your identification data (name and surname, email address, phone) will be processed for <s>bicycle fleet management</s>. Additionally, in the event of an incident, <s>geolocation data</s> may be processed exclusively for <s>theft management and recovery</s> of the bicycle.
tsystems_privacy.para2: The legal basis legitimising these processing activities is your <s>consent</s> when registering as a user and, where applicable, the <s>execution of the contractual relationship</s>.
tsystems_privacy.para3: Your data may be shared with <s>technology providers</s> acting as <e>data processors</e> for service delivery and, when necessary, with <s>Security Forces and Bodies</s> and insurance entities in the event of theft or incident. No <s>international transfers</s> of data nor <s>automated decisions</s> are foreseen.
tsystems_privacy.para4: Your personal data will be retained for as long as you are a user of the service and maintain your relationship with <s>PANOT MOBILITY, S.L.</s>, and thereafter for the legally established periods.
tsystems_privacy.para5: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and portability, as well as withdraw your consent, by writing to hola@panotmobility.com. If you wish, you may also lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.
tsystems_privacy.para6: Controller: PANOT MOBILITY, S.L. (VAT B01593730). Address: C/ Balmes 362, 08006 – Barcelona.

error_boundary.title: Something went wrong
error_boundary.message: The application encountered an unexpected error.

version_check.help_description: This is a progressive web app (PWA). Sometimes the browser saves an old version in cache and doesn't load the update even when you reload the page. Select your device:
version_check.help_after: After these steps, the page will load the latest version. 🚀

my_assignments.finish_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the booking?

faq.manual_title: Best practices guide for electric bicycle use
faq.faq_intro: Welcome to our FAQ section. Here you will find answers to the most common questions we receive, designed to help you resolve your doubts quickly and efficiently.
